NAVAREA XIX 21/20 
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 271830 UTC FEB 2020
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

71-20.5N - 020-23.3E DEEPSEA ATLANTIC
65-37.4N - 007-29.3E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
65-31.4N - 006-36.5E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
65-25.5N - 007-08.2E TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC
65-05.2N - 006-40.9E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE

NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 20/20
